Class UserFinancialStateDto

java.lang.Object
com.abrahamquintana.personalfinancemanager.dto.UserFinancialStateDto
public class UserFinancialStateDto extends Object
DTO representing the complete financial state of a user. Includes past and future transactions of the current month, balance information and spending projections.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private BigDecimal
    currentBalance
    Real current balance based on past transactions.
    private BigDecimal
    dailyAvailable
    Money available per day considering future expenses of the month.
    private List<TransactionDto>
    futureTransactions
    Future transactions of the current month (predicted or recurring).
    private BigDecimal
    monthInitialBalance
    Balance at the beginning of the month, before any transactions.
    private List<TransactionDto>
    pastTransactions
    Past transactions of the current month.
    private BigDecimal
    todayAvailable
    Money available today considering today's expenses.
    private BigDecimal
    totalExpenseThisMonth
    Total expenses registered in the current month.
    private BigDecimal
    totalIncomeThisMonth
    Total income registered in the current month.
